title: Shareable Templates for Other Accounts
excerpt:

posts.author: buewho (Virginia Buechel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think that Monday is missing a lot of opportunities to bring in new users by not having shareable board templates. This could be so helpful for agencies or affiliates looking to share their board creations.

This would allow users to the ability to share templates with complex systems that solve particular problems or issues.

i.e. I have created a series of social media content calendar boards that I would love to share the functionality with other marketing teams, but right now I would have to build it from scratch

The power of sharing!
